race.comment: BOLDINHO (2) is a smart sprinter resuming. Finished runner-up behind Dakota Lee in the Pioneer Sprint before a break. Has won 6/8 here and is expected to go close. BALASTIER (1) has one up on him on fitness and looks the main threat. Former Victorian who was heavily bet and led throughout to score. Speedy galloper drawn well and can go on with it. WALLENDA (11) is a former NSW galloper who was also off the mark at first run for the new yard. Down in weight and can only be fitter again. CINQUE TORRI (3) is fitter and looks a strong chance off the inside. COTEHELE (5) rates highly and can do much better this time.
